chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1317 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 21.11.2025 None present for the applicant Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State ****** For reasons to be recorded, the posted-arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused Junaid Ahmed s/o Muhammad Ilyas and Zakriya Shah s/o Inayatullah Shah, subject to each furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.80,000/- and P.R Bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial Court. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
